name: Bauernfruhstuck (Farmers Breakfast)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil unpeeled potatoes for 30 minutes.
2. Rinse under cold water, peel and set aside to cool.
3. Slice the cooled potatoes.
4. In a large frypan, cook bacon until transparent. Add potato slices; cook until lightly browned.
5. Meanwhile, blend eggs with milk and salt in a bowl. Stir in cubed ham.
6. Cut tomatoes into thin wedges; add to the egg mixture.
7. Pour the egg mixture over the potatoes in the frypan.
8. Cook until the eggs are set. Sprinkle with chopped chives and serve immediately.
